items.author: Last Night In Basketball
items.body_excerpt: There's obviously been a lot of talk about LeBron James' potential destination this offseason. Where will he go, where should he go, what will his future team look like if and when he does sign there, etc. There's been less talk, rightfully so, about what those teams will look…

items.title: Weird stat:
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Weird stat:

Caleb Wilson is shooting .480 from three and .231 from the free throw line in summer league.

He shot .259 from three and .713 from the free throw line in college.

Upside down...

items.title: After Giannis was traded to Miami and not Boston, Mike Gansey leaned on some advice he learned in his climb up the Cavaliers’ front office:
items.author: Gina Mizell
items.body_excerpt:
After Giannis was traded to Miami and not Boston, Mike Gansey leaned on some advice he learned in his climb up the Cavaliers’ front office: 

Make the call to check on Jaylen Brown. 

“…and they don’t say no. It just kept going on, and they would call us, we would call them.”

More from our convo👇🏻
